commit.message:
Add signal evaluation overlay on price chart (#19)

* Add signal evaluation overlay on price chart

Frontend support for build_signal(action="evaluate") results:
- New SignalEvaluation/SignalEvaluateResponse types
- Zustand store: signalEvaluations map keyed by symbol, cleared on thread switch
- BuildSignalToolUI: parses evaluate results, pushes to store
- SignalMarkerLayer: batched SVG diamond markers (purple entry, gold exit)
- PriceChartView: reads signal evals from store, passes to chart, renders legend

Enables users to preview where entry/exit signals fire on a price chart
before running a full backtest.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix timeline hover reset: preserve snapshot on mouseleave/mousemove

When the timeline scrubber is positioned at a past tick, mousing off the
canvas was unconditionally redrawing the live state (lastCells/lastFlags).

- Add getDisplayCellsAndFlags() helper that returns snapshot data when
  scrubbingIndex >= 0, or live data when in live mode (scrubbingIndex == -1)
- Use it in the mouseleave handler so leaving the canvas restores the
  correct snapshot view instead of jumping to live state
- Use it in the god-mode mousemove RAF callback so hover highlighting is
  also based on the currently displayed snapshot

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat: enforce flag spacing rule (min 4 units, gap exception)

- Add FLAG_MIN_SPACING=4 constant to rules.js
- flagsSeparatedByGap() helper uses Bresenham line to detect empty
  cells between two flag positions
- place_flag rejects flags within 4 Euclidean grid units of any other
  flag unless an empty-cell gap separates them
- RULES.md updated with spacing rule description

commit.message:
fix: remove AZURE_RECORD_MODE override from Set-CliBuildVariables.ps1 (#7103)

The script unconditionally set AZURE_RECORD_MODE=playback as a pipeline
variable before the test task runs, overriding the AzureRecordMode pipeline
parameter introduced in PR #6893. This caused manually triggered LIVE test
runs to still execute in playback mode.

The record mode is now fully controlled by the AzureRecordMode parameter
chain (release-cli.yml → build-and-test.yml → build-cli.yml).

Fixes #7102

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Bootstrap documentation-first Legion Go repo

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Phase 7: demo runner + web dashboard + two bug fixes

- src/demo/run.ts: full E2E CLI demo runner (bootstrap, progress bar, summary)
- src/demo/dashboard/server.ts: Fastify SSE/REST server for web dashboard
- src/demo/dashboard/public/: HTML/CSS/JS 2x2 grid dashboard

Bug fix 1 (mayor.ts): always assign best-ranked candidate even when
rankScore is negative. The newcomer penalty (-1) on high-complexity tasks
was blocking permanent assignment when no established agent was available,
causing tasks 003 and 006 to stall forever.

Bug fix 2 (wanted-board.ts): shouldClaim() now checks ALL capabilities for
the required domain instead of only the first. Echo has three testing-domain
capabilities (unit, integration, e2e); the old find() always picked unit-testing
which had zero tag overlap with task-007's [integration-testing, e2e-testing]
requirement, permanently preventing task-007 from being claimed.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

docs: correct COPILOT_GITHUB_TOKEN requirements

with Account permissions → Copilot Requests: Read-only. Classic PATs are
explicitly rejected by the gh-aw runner.

commit.message:
fix(readme): fix pre-commit hooks and regenerate README/TILES from actual skills (#8)

* fix(readme): fix lefthook sync hooks and regenerate README/TILES from actual skills

- Fix lefthook.yml: move readme-sync, yamllint, shellcheck, tessl-lint
  into the commands block (were incorrectly nested at pre-commit level
  and never ran)
- Widen readme-sync trigger glob from .context/audits/*.md to
  {skills/**,cli/**,.context/audits/**} so it fires on any skill change
- Add TILES.md to the files regenerated and staged by readme-sync
- Fix tile-parser to skip private child tiles when parent dir has a
  tile.json (prevents opencode sub-skills appearing as 9 separate tiles)
- Fix trailing double newline in generated README.md causing MD012 errors
- Add languages domain to domain-config.ts for future skill discoverability
- Regenerate README.md and TILES.md: now accurately reflects 48 tiles

* Potential fix for pull request finding

commit.message:
Preserve Dapr configuration on container app deployment (#7062)

* Initial plan

* Fix: preserve Dapr configuration during container app deployment

Co-authored-by: spboyer <7681382+spboyer@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: improve Dapr preservation error handling and add 404 test

- Handle 404 (first deploy) explicitly in persistSettings instead of
  swallowing all errors — proceed without persisting when app does not
  exist yet
- Fail on non-404 errors when Dapr preservation is needed to prevent
  silent config wipe (correctness-critical path)
- Add test for first-deploy scenario (GET 404) verifying no Dapr
  config is injected
- Fix pre-existing cspell issues (projectpkg, agentserver)
- Apply go fix modernizations (to.Ptr -> new)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Add 7 new Lit web component pages with routing, nav, and API updates

New components:
- interface-edit-page: Config form with type-specific fields, services table
- interface-status-page: Real-time tuner/streamer status with auto-refresh
- interface-log-page: Terminal-style log viewer
- cloud-page: Cloud connection status and details
- update-page: Package update management with selection
- hls-wizard-page: Two-panel HLS service configuration wizard
- forced-content-page: Toggle-based forced content management

Updated files:

commit.message:
Fix NRE in AddUniversalDynamicSymbol for invalid symbol address ranges (#2376)

When a ProcessSymbol event has an invalid address range (e.g.,
StartAddress=0x0, EndAddress=0xFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF from zeroed
/proc/kallsyms on Linux without root), the ETLX conversion crashed
with a NullReferenceException.

Three fixes applied:
1. Skip symbols where EndAddress <= StartAddress (invalid range)
2. Change (int) to (long) cast for the size parameter to match
   ForAllUnresolvedCodeAddressesInRange's parameter type
3. Add null guard on loadedModule as defense-in-depth

Fixes #2373

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Fix TextToImage: patch UNet timestep input shape [] -> [1] with Squeeze node

The MLNet.ImageGeneration.OnnxGenAI library passes timestep as a 1-D
tensor [1], but the optimum-exported UNet expects a scalar []. Patched
the ONNX graph to accept [1] and Squeeze to scalar for compatibility.

Updated manifest hash to match the patched unet/model.onnx on HuggingFace.

commit.message:
Fix MSVC package platform being split by PowerShell

PowerShell was splitting -DEOLIB_PACKAGE_PLATFORM=Windows.VS2022.x64
at the first dot in the value, causing cmake to receive 'Windows' as
the variable value and '.VS2022.x64' as a separate ignored argument.
This resulted in CPackConfig.cmake generating eolib-x.y.z-Windows.zip
instead of eolib-x.y.z-Windows.VS2022.x64.zip.

Fix: wrap the argument in double quotes so PowerShell passes it as a
single token to cmake.exe. Also consolidate -D CMAKE_SUPPRESS_REGENERATION
to -DCMAKE_SUPPRESS_REGENERATION (no space) for consistency.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix: stop daemon subprocess on device disable to remove MA player

When disabling a device via POST /api/device/enabled, call
set_bt_management_enabled(False) on the active client. This stops the
daemon subprocess which disconnects from MA WebSocket, causing MA to
fire ClientRemovedEvent and unregister the player immediately.

commit.message:
feat: two-tier enabled/disabled — global device on/off with separate BT release

Redesign the enabled flag into a two-tier system:

1. Global enabled (config, requires restart): when enabled=false, no
   SendspinClient, BluetoothManager, port, or MA registration is created.
   Device metadata stored in state for UI display.

2. BT Release/Reclaim (hot toggle): existing functionality, only
   available when globally enabled. Releases BT adapter to host OS.

Changes:
- state.py: add disabled_devices storage (set/get with thread safety)
- sendspin_client.py: skip disabled devices entirely in main() loop
- routes/api_status.py: include disabled_devices in /api/status response
- routes/api_bt.py: add POST /api/device/enabled endpoint (restart_required)
- static/app.js: render disabled devices section, add Disable button
- templates/index.html: add #disabled-devices-section container
- static/style.css: dimmed/grayscale styling for disabled cards
- tests: 7 new tests covering state, API, and endpoint validation

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Update all image model manifests with real SHA256 hashes and sizes

Replace PLACEHOLDER values in all 10 image model-manifest.json files
with actual SHA256 hashes and file sizes from exported ONNX models
hosted on huggingface.co/lquint. Add unet/model.onnx_data entry to
TextToImage manifest for the external weights file.

Models hosted:
- vit-base-patch16-224-onnx (ImageClassification)
- yolov8s-onnx (ObjectDetection)
- segformer-b0-finetuned-ade-512-512-onnx (ImageSegmentation)
- dpt-hybrid-midas-onnx (DepthEstimation)
- clip-vit-base-patch32-onnx (ImageEmbedding + ZeroShotClassification)
- git-base-coco-onnx (ImageCaptioning)
- git-base-textvqa-onnx (VisualQA)
- sam2-hiera-tiny-onnx (SegmentAnything)
- stable-diffusion-v1-4-onnx (TextToImage)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: model-packages-prototype

commit.message:
Add privacy policy page

- Create standalone privacy.html page with full privacy policy text
- Include all required sections: data collection, usage, retention, rights, etc.
- Add navigation back to home page
- Style with same design system as main site
- Include contact email: contact@familybeachtrips.com

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Add Guest Wall section with form and styling

- Add guest-wall nav link to navigation menu
- Implement Guest Wall form with Basin endpoint (https://usebasin.com/f/dcf997485946)
- Form collects: email, first name, last name, phone, city, state, check-in/out dates, photo upload
- Add consent checkbox linking to privacy policy
- Create guest photos grid template for manual photo additions
- Style form and photo gallery with responsive CSS
- Add placeholder for initial guest photos display
- Position Guest Wall section before Reviews

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Add standalone price chart view for get_raw_prices (#18)

* Add standalone price chart view for get_raw_prices tool

Wire up the get_raw_prices MCP tool with an inline chat card, loading
skeleton, and full dashboard view (summary stats, candlestick chart with
indicator overlays/subcharts, and volume subchart). Reshapes raw OHLCV
array responses into PriceChartResponse before store insertion.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix overlay legend colors and volume bar rendering

Export OVERLAY_COLORS from PriceChart and use it in both price-chart-view
and stock-backtest-view legends so swatches match the actual chart lines.
Replace raw <rect> with Recharts <Cell> for proper per-bar volume coloring.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Address Copilot review: trim, preventDefault, loop, mount

- Trim whitespace before checking error string prefix in tool UIs
- Prevent default scroll on Space key for role="button" elements
- Replace Math.max/min spread with single-pass loop in computeStats
- Mount GetRawPricesToolUI in AppShell so it actually renders

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add get_raw_prices to cacheable tools

Same symbol + date range always returns the same OHLCV data,
so cache identical calls to avoid redundant MCP round-trips.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Update components/tool-uis/index.tsx

Co-authored-by: Copilot <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Move volume into PriceChart as integrated subchart

Volume now renders as a subchart inside PriceChart (like RSI/MACD),
sharing the same zoom/pan state and x-axis alignment. Added showVolume
prop, VolumeSubchart component with per-bar up/down coloring, and
removed the standalone volume chart from PriceChartView.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Hide volume subchart axes for cleaner appearance

Remove Y-axis scale and X-axis from volume subchart — the "Volume"
label is sufficient context and the x-axis is already shown by the
chart above it.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix volume subchart left alignment with price chart

Replace hidden Y-axis with a visible but empty one (width: 50) to
match the price chart's Y-axis width and align plot areas.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Force limit: null for get_raw_prices to fetch full dataset

The backend defaults to 500 sampled bars to fit LLM context windows,
but our frontend renders charts visually and needs all bars. Override
the limit arg before execute so the full OHLCV history is returned.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Use toolCallId for result dedup key instead of args hash

Each tool call from Claude has a unique ID, so repeated calls with
identical args (e.g. same symbol) now create separate dashboard
entries. Dedup still protects against React strict mode double-renders.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Suppress chart_spec blocks when tool UI handles visualization

Tell Claude not to output chart_spec code blocks when it's already
calling a tool like get_raw_prices — the tool UI renders the chart.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add price chart suggestion to new chat welcome screen

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Keep get_raw_prices responses brief — no analysis or commentary

The user just wants to see the chart, not a wall of text about
key observations and price trends.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Truncate large tool results before sending to Claude to reduce token usage

Replaces OHLCV arrays and other large tool results (>2000 chars) with
compact summaries in the conversation history sent to Claude, preventing
rate limit exhaustion on multi-turn conversations with price data.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Optimize price chart performance: ref-based zoom, batched volume SVG, data slicing

- useDragZoom reads view bounds from refs, registers listeners once
- VolumeSubchart uses batched SVG paths instead of 1000+ Cell DOM nodes
- Pass only visible data slice + buffer to ComposedChart

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
